name: brainlink
description: Local-first Markdown memory for Codex agents using Brainlink MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first Markdown memory for Codex agents.
interface.longDescription: Brainlink gives Codex agents a repeatable memory workflow backed by Markdown notes, wiki links, tags, local indexing and MCP tools for context retrieval, durable memory writes and graph validation.
